observation: Sonne Improvement Proposal 15 proposed adding VELO markets on Optimism; CertiK reports voting closed May 7 with unanimous approval.
Analyses describe scheduled multi-transaction market setup and c-factor changes becoming executable after a two-day timelock.
CertiK reports the attacker supplied 400000001 wei VELO to mint 2 wei of soVELO before the attack flow.
The attacker borrowed about 35469150 VELO and transferred it directly to the soVELO contract, increasing totalCash without proportional soVELO minting.
CertiK reports the manipulated exchange rate made 1 wei soVELO worth 17735851 VELO.
CertiK reports the manipulated 2 wei soVELO position enabled borrowing 265 WETH before the flow repeated across additional markets.
Public incident reports place total losses near 20 million dollars across multiple Sonne Optimism markets.
Sonne announced that Optimism markets were paused and later explored recovery options including a bounty offer to the attacker.
